# Zippp.link

> Zippp.link is a minimalist WhatsApp store builder for independent sellers. Sellers create a link with a product list; buyers pick quantities, see a live total, and tap through to a pre-filled WhatsApp order message. Free to start; name-your-price yearly plan unlocks unlimited products, integrations, and analytics.

## What it does

- Turns an Instagram or TikTok bio link into a store: buyers add items, see a running total, and the order is sent as a pre-filled WhatsApp message, no separate cart or checkout page.
- Built for sellers currently taking orders through Instagram DMs, payment screenshots, and a manually updated Google Sheet.
- Free tier: 1 link, up to 5 products, Zippp branding, 200 views/month.
- Paid tier (name-your-price, $5/year minimum): unlimited links and products, no branding, custom WhatsApp message, full analytics, Google Sheets sync, Shopify import, local payment links (UPI, Paystack, Pix, GCash).

## Docs

- [Pricing](https://zippp.link/pricing): free vs. paid tier breakdown, name-your-price model.
- [Demo](https://zippp.link/demo): live interactive store, no signup required.
- [FAQ](https://zippp.link/#faq): Shopify import, regional payment methods, refund policy.

## Positioning

- Not a general storefront builder like Shopify, no inventory system, no shipping calculator, deliberately scoped to the "share a link, get a WhatsApp order" use case.
- Not just a link-in-bio tool like Linktree, calculates cart totals and generates the WhatsApp deep link automatically, which link-in-bio tools don't do.
- Primary users: independent sellers running a business over WhatsApp, home bakers, thrift resellers, small creators, in markets where WhatsApp is the default commerce channel (Indonesia, Nigeria, India, Brazil, Philippines).

## Optional

- [Roadmap](https://zippp.link/roadmap): upcoming integrations, voted on by users.
- [Privacy](https://zippp.link/privacy)
- [Terms](https://zippp.link/terms)
